title: ActiveCampaign API not returning all user IDs
symptom: The HTTPS request to ActiveCampaign returns fewer user IDs than expected, causing issues in subsequent steps.
applies_when: Fetching user IDs via HTTPS request
not_this_if: All user IDs are returned in a single response
root_cause: ActiveCampaign's API paginates responses, meaning it only returns a limited number of records per request. If pagination is not handled, the request will stop after the first page of results, leading to incomplete data retrieval.
fix_steps: Check the ActiveCampaign API documentation for pagination parameters like 'limit' and 'offset'.
In n8n, configure the HTTPS node to handle pagination by using a loop to repeatedly call the API with an increasing offset.
Combine all results into a single list until all records are retrieved.
agent_instruction: Implement pagination in your HTTPS node to retrieve all user IDs from ActiveCampaign.
